completed_tasks: Created the form-first audio-to-score orchestrator skill and UI metadata.
Defined form, melody, accompaniment, verification, provenance, linear-score, and written-form contracts.
Added deterministic final-score validation with valid and representative invalid cases.
Repositioned audio-chord-recognition as a standalone or approved-form-aware harmony module.
Kept standalone chord-analysis validation backward compatible while enforcing form coordinates in module mode.
Added explicit one-skill drift-check and atomic install commands with content receipts and rollback behavior.
Installed and hash-verified audio-to-score and audio-chord-recognition in the Codex skill directory.
Refined validation to enforce section membership ranges, continuous bar-in-section values, linear performance order, approved reviewer identity, lyric structure, and melody source timing.
notes: Evidence extraction is parallel, but form is the first adjudicated artifact.
The approved form map cannot be silently rewritten by harmony or arrangement passes.
The complete linear performance timeline remains authoritative; written repeats are derived through explicit mappings.
Generated accompaniment uses separate provenance and approval from source transcription.
The installed copies contain .codex-source.json receipts; the generated receipt is excluded from content drift hashing.
No rendered product UI or songs data was changed.
